description: This component is used in many places, including: * Primitive Member Editor for directly editing TextFields (and Ref Hacking) * UIX and TextFields * Parsing floats and parsing ints

fields.Text: The output of where the text is going to be placed at.
fields.Undo: If true, the setting of the text is undoable.
fields.UndoDescription: This gets shown on the undo button on the Context menu.
fields.FinishHandling: Lets the Text editor know what to do when the user leaves a text input.
fields.AutoCaretColorField: Automatically sets the color of the caret (based on text color).
fields.SelectionColorField: Sets the selection color for this caret.
fields.EditingStarted: Gives the TextEditor an action when the editing has started.
fields.EditingChanged: Gives the TextEditor an action when the editing has changed.
fields.EditingFinished: Gives the TextEditor an action when the editing has finished.
fields.SubmitPressed: Gives the TextEditor an action when the editing has been submitted.

usage:
This component is used in many places, including:
* Primitive Member Editor for directly editing TextFields (and Ref Hacking)
* UIX and TextFields
* Parsing floats and parsing ints
